sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Amah a Muangte Hu

verses.text: Sangpenpa' liahna sung, Vanglianpa' liim sungah a om mi khempeuh in
Topa' tungah, “Ka bukna leh ka munkip muan'huai, ka muan' ka Pasian na hi hi,” ci ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thangsiahpa' thangzak leh a lauhuai pulnatna panin nang hong honkhia ding hi
Amah in a khate tawh nang hong tuam ding a, ama khate' nuai-ah bukna ding na mu ding hi. Ama thumanna in nang hong dalin hong hu ding hi
Nangmah in zana lauhuaina, sun-a thaltang leengte, khuamial lakah a vak khiankhian pulnatna, sun nitaang-a suksiatnate na kihta kei ding hi
Na kiangah mi tul khat, na kimkotah mi tul sawm, hong tukin a sih hangin bangmah na ci kei ding hi
Na mit tawh na en bek ding a, migilote a kithukkikna na mu ding hi
Nangmah in Topa pen na bukna dingin bawlin, Sangpenpa, nang a hong hu dingin bawl khin na hih manin
nangma tungah siatna hong tunglo ding a, na inn sungah gimna hong tunglo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah a hong cing dingin amah in ama vantung mi nang hong kemsak ding hi
Na khete leh suang a kitahkhak lohna dingin amaute in a khut uh tawh nang hong dom ding uh hi
Nangmah in humpinelkai leh gul gunei tung na tawn ding a, na khenuai-ah humpinelkai khanglai leh gulpi na tuancil ding hi
Itna tawh hong bel ahih manin amah ka honkhia ding a, ka min hong thei ahih manin mun sangna-ah amah ka koih ding hi
Amah in hong sap ciangin amah ka dawng ding hi. Haksatna sungah amah ka ompih ding a, amah honkhia-in ka pahtawi ding hi
Nuntak sau tawh amah ka lungkimsak ding a, amah ka honkhia ding hi.
